      -------------------------------------------------------------------
                        STM32CubeProgrammer v2.22.0
      -------------------------------------------------------------------

ST-LINK SN  : 066BFF514852898767094734
ST-LINK FW  : V3J11M3
Board       : NUCLEO-L476RG
Voltage     : 3.28V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset
Device ID   : 0x415
Revision ID : Rev 3
Device name : STM32L47xxx/L48xxx
Flash size  : 1 MBytes (default)
Device type : MCU
Device CPU  : Cortex-M4
BL Version  : 0x90

OB DISPLAY ============================================================

Read Out Protection:
  RDP          : 0xAA (Level 0, no protection)

BOR Level:
  BOR_LEV      : 0x0 (BOR Level 0, reset level threshold around 1.7 V)

User Configuration:
  nRST_STOP    : 0x1 (No reset generated when entering Stop mode)
  nRST_STDBY   : 0x1 (No reset generated when entering Standby mode)
  nRST_SHDW    : 0x1 (No reset generated when entering Shutdown mode)
  IWDG_SW      : 0x1 (Software independent watchdog)
  IWDG_STOP    : 0x1 (Independent watchdog frozen in Stop mode)
  IWDG_STDBY   : 0x1 (Independent watchdog frozen in Standby mode)
  WWDG_SW      : 0x1 (Software window watchdog)
  nBOOT1       : 0x1 (Boot from main flash)
  SRAM2_PE     : 0x1 (SRAM2 parity check disabled)
  SRAM2_RST    : 0x1 (SRAM2 not erased on reset)

Boot Configuration:
  BFB2         : 0x0 (Dual bank boot disabled)
  DBANK        : 0x1 (Dual bank mode enabled)
  DB1M         : 0x0 (Single bank with 512Kb flash)
